## Analyzers (2)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [BackscatterIO GetObservations v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO)
Determine whether a value has known scanning activity using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`

#### [BackscatterIO Enrichment v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO)
Enrich values using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`, `port`
